name: Agent Link
description:
Someone had to do it. (Part 3)

The Legend of Zelda James Bond/Modern AU. Inspired by that one Majora’s Mask FMV with Duran Duran’s “A View To A Kill”. It’s been years since I last played the games, so if I miss something, please let me know!

Art credit is on the bottom left of the picture.
creator: Zesty Citrus Juice
